column2: These figures exclude farm agriculture (SIC subclass 01000).
These figures are incomplete as some of the areas from which they are
creates have had farm agriculture (SIC subclass 01000) data suppressed.
The level of rounding applied varies by estimate. Please see article for
further information on how rounding is applied
https://www.nomisweb.co.uk/articles/1103.aspx
ONS have identified a quality issue resulting from geographical misreporting
that affects output for the years 2015 to 2024. While the main headline
employment estimates at national and regional levels remain unaffected, the
employment estimates for the local authorities of Hillingdon and Hounslow, and certain
areas within them, are compromised and thus should be used with caution. In
line with our BRES revision policy, ONS will revise the provisional 2024 tables
as part of the annual update in October 2026. Note that earlier years will
not be revised, as BRES provides point‑in‑time estimates and is not designed
for time‑series analysis.
